overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded character walking through a historic Islamic palace complex. The character moves from a covered stone arcade to an open terrace overlooking a desert city at golden hour, eventually approaching a large green dome structure, and ending with an aerial view of the entire palace complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered palace walkway with seating areas

events.description: character approaches archway exit transitioning from covered corridor to open terrace

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade passing by NPCs

notable_agents.action: sweeping the stone floor with a broom

entered.detail: intricate brick vaulted ceiling with geometric patterns
thick stone support column with carved details
tall blue and white ceramic vase on stone pedestal
long red woven rug along the walkway
wooden tables and chairs arranged for seating

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone arcade with vaulted ceilings and arches. A worker sweeps the floor on the left while other NPCs sit at tables on the right. The space is sheltered with partial sky visibility through the arches, transitioning toward an exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated palace terrace with panoramic city views

events.description: exits covered arcade into open terrace with expansive city view
path curves slightly to the right while maintaining forward motion

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated terrace overlooking the desert city

entered.detail: decorative carved stone balustrade with geometric lattice patterns
dense cluster of historic buildings and minstrels in the distance
green leafy shrubs lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens to a wide terrace with ornate stone railings overlooking a vast desert city. The character walks along the path with bushes on the left and the city skyline visible in the hazy distance. The lighting shifts to bright natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit palace terrace with decorative planters

events.description: sun becomes directly visible creating lens flare and strong backlighting
approaching descending stairs and turn in the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the terrace path passing potted plants with sun glare increasing

entered.detail: large terracotta pots containing palm saplings
ceramic pots with purple flowering bushes
sandy desert with scattered palm trees and distant structures
simple wooden seating along the terrace edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the terrace as the sun becomes visible, creating a warm golden hour glow and lens flare. Potted plants line the left side of the path while the view shifts to show more of the desert landscape with palm trees. The stone railing continues along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace terrace at green dome structure

events.description: large green dome structure comes into view dominating the scene
character stops walking and turns to face the green dome

agents.ego_description: approaching the green dome and stopping to look up at the structure

entered.detail: massive green tiled dome with weathered patina and decorative bands
intricate blue and gold tiled foundation of the dome structure

segments.scene_description: The character rounds a corner and the massive green dome comes into view, dominating the skyline. The character stops and turns to face the structure, which features intricate tilework at its base. The sun backlights the scene creating a silhouette effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial overview of palace complex with multiple domes

events.description: camera transitions from ground third-person to aerial drone view of palace
text overlay appears identifying location as The Palace of the Green Dome

agents.ego_description: camera observes the palace complex from aerial perspective

entered.detail: full view of the palace with multiple domes, courtyards, and surrounding buildings
smaller blue and green domes surrounding the main dome
dense urban fabric of historic Baghdad extending to horizon

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to an aerial view revealing the entire palace complex with its distinctive green domes, courtyards, and surrounding city. The camera slowly pans across the complex as text appears identifying the location as The Palace of the Green Dome, showcasing the architecture in the warm golden hour light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the sheltered interior of a stone arcade to a sweeping aerial vista of a desert palace complex at golden hour. It begins within a covered walkway of vaulted ceilings and arches, passing by workers and seated NPCs before emerging from the shelter into the bright natural sunlight of a wide terrace. As the character walks along ornate stone railings and potted plants, the lighting shifts into a warm golden glow with lens flares that illuminate the hazy city skyline and distant palm trees. The scene then rounds a corner to reveal a massive green dome with intricate tilework that silhouettes against the sun, before the perspective finally lifts into a high aerial pan. This expansive view reveals the entire Palace of the Green Dome, showcasing its courtyards and architecture nestled within the surrounding city.
